title: Senior Software Engineer - HP India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - HP India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
HP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HP India:
HP India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India!
jsonLd.skills: Machine Learning, JavaScript, TypeScript, REST APIs, Python, Microservices, CI/CD, Kubernetes
